goal.statement: Make Property Management LeadGen production-ready for non-technical users — PyInstaller bundling, cross-platform installers, encrypted credentials, CI release pipeline, 65%+ coverage, zero Dependabot critical alerts.
scope_boundaries: Do NOT modify the IPC protocol wire format
Do NOT change the database schema without migration
Do NOT add external paid services (telemetry, monitoring)

backlog.title: PyInstaller sidecar bundling
backlog.description: Test pyinstaller --onefile on src/main.py, verify binary works

backlog.title: Tauri externalBin + tauri.conf.json
backlog.description: Configure tauri.conf.json for externalBin, update bundle settings

backlog.title: Keychain credential storage
backlog.description: Move API keys from SQLite plaintext to OS keychain (keyring lib)

backlog.title: npm audit fixes
backlog.description: Fix 5 Dependabot alerts from npm deps

backlog.title: Coverage improvements — county_assessor and csv_import
backlog.description: Add unit tests for county_assessor.py (18%) and csv_import.py (33%)

backlog.title: Release CI pipeline
backlog.description: GitHub Actions release workflow building installers for all platforms
